title: AI Prompting Power with Tomi Abe
description: Advanced prompting and generative workflow training for Loblaw Digital's AI Committee.
content:
In a webinar hosted by Loblaw Digital's AI Committee, I shared my strategies for using generative AI tools and prompting techniques to create superior creative and design work.

The session covered advanced prompting frameworks, practical generative workflow techniques, and how to integrate AI tools into real professional practice without losing craft or judgment.

Watch session ↗
